title: Login page throws 500 error on submit
description: When users click the Login button after entering valid credentials, the server returns a 500 Internal Server Error. This started after the auth-service deployment on Monday. Stack trace points to a null pointer in TokenValidator.
resolution: Fixed null check in TokenValidator.validate() when refresh token cookie is missing. Deployed hotfix auth-service v2.3.1.

title: Users unable to sign in, server error 500
description: Multiple customers reporting they cannot log in. Getting a generic server error page. Seems to have started recently, possibly tied to a backend release.

title: Dashboard widgets fail to load on first paint
description: On initial page load, revenue and usage widgets show a spinner indefinitely. Refreshing the page fixes it. Appears related to a race condition in the widget data fetcher.
resolution: Added await for auth context initialization before widget data fetch calls fire. Released in v4.1.0.

title: Widgets stuck loading on dashboard first visit
description: New users report the main dashboard widgets never finish loading the first time they open the app after signing up. Works fine on reload.

title: CSV export truncates rows above 10,000
description: Large report exports silently cut off at exactly 10,000 rows with no warning or error shown to the user. Backend logs show a hardcoded LIMIT clause in the export query.
resolution: Removed hardcoded LIMIT, added pagination and streaming CSV writer for exports over 5,000 rows.

title: Large exports missing data past row 10k
description: Finance team exported a report with ~40k rows and only received 10k. No error was shown. Needs urgent fix before month-end close.

title: Mobile app crashes on push notification tap
description: Tapping a push notification when the app is backgrounded on Android 13 causes an immediate crash. Crashlytics shows a NullPointerException in NotificationRouter.
resolution: Added null guard for deep-link payload parsing in NotificationRouter.onTap(). Verified fix on Android 12-14.

title: App crash when opening notification on Android
description: Getting crash reports from Android users specifically when they tap a notification to open the app. iOS seems unaffected.

title: API rate limiting returns wrong error code
description: When clients exceed the rate limit, the API returns a 400 Bad Request instead of the expected 429 Too Many Requests, breaking client-side retry logic.
resolution: Corrected error mapping in RateLimitMiddleware to return 429 with Retry-After header.

title: Client retries failing due to unexpected 400 from rate limiter
description: Our SDK's retry logic isn't kicking in when we get throttled — looks like the API is sending 400 instead of 429 when rate limited.

title: Memory leak in background sync service
description: Background sync service memory usage grows steadily over 24 hours until OOM kill. Heap dump shows accumulating event listener references.
resolution: Removed duplicate event listener registration on each sync cycle; added listener cleanup in service shutdown hook.

title: Sync worker OOM after running for about a day
description: The sync worker pod keeps getting OOMKilled after running roughly 20-24 hours in production. Restarting temporarily resolves it.

title: Search results not sorted by relevance
description: Product search returns results in an inconsistent order rather than by relevance score, making it hard for users to find what they're looking for.
resolution: Implemented BM25 scoring for search ranking and added relevance-based sort as default.

title: Search feels random, not ranked by relevance
description: Users complaining that search results don't seem to reflect how relevant they are to the query — top result is often not the best match.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Some users report never receiving the password reset email. No bounce errors visible in the mail provider dashboard.
resolution: Found emails were being flagged as spam due to missing SPF record; updated DNS records and email template.
